## ✅ Internal Checklist 
- [ ] **Branch Source:** This branch was forked from `dev` (not `main`).
- [ ] **Naming Convention:** Branch name follows `feat/`, `fix/`, `db/`, `test/`, `docs/`, `refactor/`, or `chore/`.
- [ ] **Title:** PR title is in imperative mood (e.g., 'Add...') and specific.
- [ ] **Clean Code:** All `console.log` statements have been removed.
- [ ] **Security:** No `.env` files or Supabase keys are committed in this PR.
- [ ] **Testing:** All Vitest tests (if applicable) pass locally.
- [ ] **Merge Target:** Set to merge into `dev` (never `main`).
